settings.membership_heading: Atelier Circle Membership is free, and includes:
settings.circle_benefit_one: Free UK delivery on all orders
settings.circle_benefit_two: Collect Atelier Points With Every Purchase·
settings.circle_benefit_three: A Handwritten Card with each order
settings.circle_benefit_four: Early access to new collections and offers
settings.existing_points_link_label: Already collecting points? See How Many You Have
settings.circle_consent_text: I would like to receive occasional Atelier Circle emails. I understand that I can unsubscribe at any time.and my details will be handled in accordance with Atelier Modernista's  Privacy Policy.
settings.success_text: You’re now on the Atelier Circle list. Shop using this email address and your Atelier Points will be waiting for you.
settings.member_text: Your membership is active, including complimentary UK delivery. We’re delighted to have you with us.

settings.title: Choose a Surprise Gift
settings.description: Choose a small pleasure from the Atelier’s changing selection of beautiful, useful things.
settings.availability_note: The selection changes throughout the year.

settings.title: Choose a Studio Gift
settings.description: Choose something considered for your home, desk or dressing table.
settings.availability_note: Candles, small design objects and seasonal Atelier finds.

settings.title: Choose Your Jewellery Gift
settings.description: Choose a piece of jewellery from a rotating Atelier Circle edit.

settings.title: Choose from the Atelier Cabinet
settings.description: A more generous choice of jewellery, colour and design objects selected by the Atelier.
settings.availability_note: Available only to Atelier Circle members.

settings.title: An Atelier Circle Exclusive
settings.description: Choose a limited piece or object created especially for Atelier Circle.
settings.availability_note: These pieces are not part of the main collection.

settings.title: The Atelier Box
settings.description: A beautifully presented choice of jewellery and lifestyle objects from the Atelier.

settings.title: The Curator’s Commission
settings.description: An exclusive jewellery piece in your chosen colour story, accompanied by a box personally selected for you by the Atelier.
settings.availability_note: Created individually with the Atelier after redemption.

settings.heading: Something lovely to look forward to.
settings.introduction: Earn Atelier Points and choose from jewellery, candles, design objects and other pleasures selected by the Atelier.
settings.top_reward_message: You have reached Atelier Circle’s most exceptional selection.
settings.guest_text: Join Atelier Circle and earn points towards jewellery, candles, design objects and other considered pleasures.
